headline: TASK-079 is the live v6.8 frontier after 6.7.0.

current_state.operating_goal: Close v6.8 as the Executable Quality Ledger release: make QIF-relevant evidence changes appendable and auditable while preserving the boundary that ledger pass is traceability evidence, not semantic truth.
current_state.next_value_slice: Complete TASK-079 v6.8 release closure: write release definition, checklist, and notes; run quality-ledger-audit, release-state-audit, organization-verify, CLI help benchmark, npm test, and smoke; refresh active release state only when release evidence is complete.

primary_frontier_task.title: v6.8 release closure: ship Executable Quality Ledger

visible_state.speech_bubble: I need council review before I should execute.
visible_state.next_action: Submit the gate packet to council review before actor execution.

why_now.summary: TASK-079 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 6.7.0 and the runtime is now targeting v6.8.
The current operating goal and next value slice both reinforce TASK-079 as the next bounded operating move.
